description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-mac that runs on push to main, pull requests to main, and merge groups for main. The workflow has two jobs: test-mac-os-m1 and test-mac-os. The test-mac-os-m1 job runs on macos-14, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up ccache, caches Homebrew packages, installs dependencies, builds, and runs tests. The test-mac-os job runs on macos-13, performs similar steps, but with additional cleanup for Python installations.
